title: Sideflord's Easy Trading Mod
description: A mod made to simplify trade between players and introduce an easy to use economy for servers
body:
### SETM adds: 
- 2 new blocks (TradingPost, CoinOre) 
- 2 Items (TradingPostTool, QuartzCog) 
- Coins, that is used as main trading currency in this mod.

###   If you ever wanted to have simple, easy to use trading system, that you can set anywhere in the world, its just the mod that you need.

### Here is a few steps to start using these blocks:
- First you need to obtain quartz and diamonds to craft quartz cogs
- Second create tool and TradingPost
- Third place TradingPost and claim it with tool
- Fourth set any item you want to trade in the highest slot and change price
- Fifth press lock button to lock price and get your item ready to sell
### Usefull tips
- To show or hide your balance press B (By Default)
- Main source of money in this mod is Coin Ore (Can be mined in the overworld From -64Y to 64Y)
- There's no coin item in this mod, in exchange all your money is showed in special balance UI
### Plans for future
- Block for buying items 
- Dungeons to earn more money
- Balancing Coin Ore to fit new dungeons
